name: aheart-ui-workspace
description: Vue 3 component library workspace for aheart-ui.

scripts.release:check: corepack pnpm --filter ./packages/components test && corepack pnpm --filter ./packages/components typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter ./packages/components build && corepack pnpm --dir docs build && corepack pnpm check:generated && git diff --check
